title: Managed Agents in the Gemini API
summary: Google introduced Managed Agents in the Gemini API, enabling autonomous agents to run in a remote Linux sandbox with a single API call. The system uses Gemini 3.5 Flash and the Antigravity Agent Harness, with an agent-first data model via the Interactions API and new agent-native documentation and skills.
